title: Star Wars: Episode I — The Phantom Menace (comic series)
content:
{{Top|rwm|imp|italics=1}} {{Youmayd|the comic series|''The Phantom Menace''|[[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace (disambiguation)]]|linebreak=1}} {{ComicSeries |image=[[File:Tpmtpb.jpg]] |title=''Star Wars: Episode I —
The Phantom Menace'' |writer=[[Henry Gilroy]] |penciller=[[Rodolfo Damaggio]] |inker=[[Al Williamson]] |letterer=[[Steve Dutro]] |colorist=[[David Nestelle]] |cover artist=[[Gregory Manchess|Ravenwood]] |editor=[[David Land]] |publisher=[[Dark Horse Comics]] |start date=[[May 5]], [[1999]]{{DarkHorse|url=Comics/98-042/Star-Wars-Episode-I---The-Phantom-Menace-1-of-4|text=Star Wars: Episode I - The Phantom Menace #1 (of 4)}} |end date=[[May 26]], 1999{{DarkHorse|url=Comics/98-049/Star-Wars-Episode-I---The-Phantom-Menace-4-of-4|text=Star Wars: Episode I - The Phantom Menace #4 (of 4)}} |schedule=Weekly |format=Completed |issues=4 |timeline=[[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]]''[[Star Wars: The Comics Companion]]'' |series= |preceded by= |followed by= }} '''''Star Wars: Episode I — The Phantom Menace''''' is the official [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] adaptation of the film [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''The Phantom Menace'']]. It was published weekly from [[May 5]], [[1999]] to [[May 26]], 1999. ==Plot summary== The plot of the comic follows closely the events of [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']], following two [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] as they are drawn into a trade dispute and eventually discover the [[Chosen One/Legends|Chosen One]], [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]], while en route to saving [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]]. A few lines of dialogue that were cut from the final film are present in the comic version, such as [[Daultay Dofine/Legends|Dofine's]] panicked "Blind me, we're done for!" and [[Palpatine/Legends|Darth Sidious]]' first line to Dofine. [[Darth Maul/Legends|Darth Maul]] also has more dialogue towards the conclusion of the story. Apart from these few exceptions, the comic is entirely true to the film. ==Media== {{Mediacat|from=1|imagecat=Images from Star Wars: Episode I — The Phantom Menace (comic series)}} ===Issues=== *[[Star Wars: Episode I — The Phantom Menace 1|''Star Wars: Episode I — The Phantom Menace'' 1]] *[[Star Wars: Episode I — The Phantom Menace 2|''Star Wars: Episode I — The Phantom Menace'' 2]] *[[Star Wars: Episode I — The Phantom Menace 3|''Star Wars: Episode I — The Phantom Menace'' 3]] *[[Star Wars: Episode I — The Phantom Menace 4|''Star Wars: Episode I — The Phantom Menace'' 4]] ===Collected in=== *[[Star Wars: Episode I — The Phantom Menace (hardcover)|''Star Wars: Episode I — The Phantom Menace'' hardcover]] *''[[Star Wars Omnibus: The Complete Saga]]'' *''[[Star Wars Legends Epic Collection: Rise of the Sith Vol. 2]]'' *''[[Star Wars Legends: Rise of the Sith Omnibus]]'' ==Sources== *{{SWArchive|url=eu/lit/comics/f19990501/index.html|text=''The Phantom Menace'' Online Comic}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Episode1Multimedia}} {{Interlang |de=Episode I – Die dunkle Bedrohung (Comic) |es=Star Wars Episodio I: La Amenaza Fantasma (cómics) |ka=ვარსკვლავური ომები, ეპიზოდი I: ფარული მუქარა (კომიქსების სერია) |pl=Mroczne widmo (adaptacja komiksowa) |pt=Star Wars Episódio I: A Ameaça Fantasma (quadrinhos) }} [[Category:Comic film adaptations|1]] [[Category:Dark Horse Comics comic miniseries|Episode 1]] [[Category:Legends comic miniseries|Episode 1]] {{RelatedCategories |[[Category:Star Wars: Episode I — The Phantom Menace issues]] }}
